note: The branch ledger — every remote branch this repo has ever pushed, cross-referenced against its GitHub PR(s) and merge status. Exists so a branch never goes quiet: a stale/abandoned branch or a PR that never got merged shows up here instead of hiding in `git branch -r`. Regenerate the git-derived fields (lastCommitDate/lastCommitSubject/aheadOfMainCommits) with `node scripts/branch-ledger.mjs`; the `prs`/`status` fields are filled in during a periodic branch audit (cross-reference GitHub's PR list) since PR lookups need network/API access this repo's $0 core never has — see brain/README.md for the full brain/ folder index.
